title: Bountiful Fish
description: This Mod Adds More Fish And Other Items To Make Fishing More Interesting!
body:
If you have any issues or suggestions, please join our [discord](https://discord.gg/Dmp2dbyNrs). 
> Bountiful Fish Is A Minecraft Mod That Adds New Fish And Other Items To Make Fishing More Interesting!

## This Mod Includes:
- 3 New Weapons
- 17 New Fish To Catch
- 4 Foodstuffs
- A New Wood Type
- Several New Advancements
- And Much More!

## New Weapons:
- Fossilized Tuna
- Anchor
- The Elder Trident

## New Wood Type (Driftwood):
> Driftwood can be found in crates as well as just when fishing regularly

## New Foodstuffs:
- Sushi
- Fish And Chips
- Shrimp Fried Rice
- _A Secret Foodstuff_

## New Fish:
- Bass
- Trout
- Catfish
- Crab
- Eel
- Lobster
- Sardine
- Seahorse
- Starfish
- Shrimp
- Octopus
- Clams
- And 6 Special _Rare_ Fish!

## Mod Compatibilities:
> Canary Trinkets: Adds An Extra Slot For Some Armors To Go Into.
